loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: This electrical meter does not measure engine thermal metrics (coolant, oil, intake, or exhaust temperature); all temperature slots are honestly blanked.

loop1.title: Pressure · Speed · Load
loop1.note: Showing load and speed time-series to correlate with thermal stressors; oil pressure and speed are not directly measured by this electrical meter, so their values are omitted or derived from available power/frequency data.

loop2: 'diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/engine-cooling' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Thermal Timeline (This electrical meter does not measure engine thermal metrics (coolant, oil, intake, or exhaust temperature); all temperature slots are honestly blanked.).
